metadata.title: Improve review payload parsing
metadata.description: Adds support for optional review summaries and CI annotations in incoming review payloads.
metadata.author: junior-dev

changed_files.diff:
@@ def parse_review_payload(payload: dict) -> ReviewSummary:
-    tests = payload.get('tests', [])
+    tests = payload.get('tests')
     return ReviewSummary(
         title=payload['title'],
         test_count=len(tests),
     )

@@ def test_payload_with_tests_counts_entries():
     summary = parse_review_payload({'title': 'PR', 'tests': ['unit']})
     assert summary.test_count == 1
+
+def test_payload_with_annotations_keeps_title():
+    summary = parse_review_payload({'title': 'PR', 'annotations': []})
+    assert summary.title == 'PR'

@@ class ReviewSummary(BaseModel):
     title: str
     test_count: int
+    annotation_count: int = 0
